# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
        - https://staging-app.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Language
        - Authorization
        - Cache-Control
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - Pragma
        - Referer
        - User-Agent
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Correlation-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-Correlation-Id
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      policy: local
      limit_by: consumer
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
      second: 50
      minute: 1000
      hour: 20000

services:
  - name: users-service
    host: users.internal
    port: 8080
    protocol: http
    path: /
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
            - https://admin.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Accept-Language
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Request-Id
            - X-Correlation-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
            - X-Correlation-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
          fault_tolerant: true
          minute: 600
          hour: 10000

    routes:
      - name: users-public
        paths:
          - /users
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Accept-Language
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-Correlation-Id
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: ip
              fault_tolerant: true
              second: 10
              minute: 200

      - name: users-admin
        paths:
          - /admin/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: true
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
              hide_credentials: true
              run_on_preflight: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              fault_tolerant: true
              minute: 120
              hour: 2000

  - name: payments-service
    host: payments.internal
    port: 8080
    protocol: http
    path: /
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false

      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Accept-Language
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Request-Id
            - X-Correlation-Id
            - Idempotency-Key
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
            - X-Correlation-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
          fault_tolerant: true
          minute: 300
          hour: 5000

    routes:
      - name: payments-create
        paths:
          - /payments
        methods:
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              fault_tolerant: true
              second: 5
              minute: 60

      - name: payments-read
        paths:
          - /payments
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              fault_tolerant: true
              second: 10
              minute: 120
